title: limonium pharosianum
intro: Limonium pharosianum, also known as Cretan sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a shrubby perennial plant with purple flowers and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Limonium pharosianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
